package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
)

// Negative scenario for sync_once_do_inside_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `sync.Once.Do(...)` inside loops.
type CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopModel
}

type CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSyncOnceDoInsideLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSyncOnceDoInsideLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "sync_once_do_inside_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    var mu sync.Mutex
    for _, item := range items { mu.Lock(); _ = item.ID; mu.Unlock() }
    sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative := map[string]int{"sync": 1, "once": 2, "do": 3, "inside": 4, "loop": 5}
    sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sync_negative_0 := sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative["sync"] + len(input)
    _ = sync_negative_0
    once_negative_1 := sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative["once"] + len(input)
    _ = once_negative_1
    do_negative_2 := sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative["do"] + len(input)
    _ = do_negative_2
    inside_negative_3 := sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative["inside"] + len(input)
    _ = inside_negative_3
    for loop_negative_4Index, item := range items { sync_once_do_inside_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_4Index }
    return nil
}
